issues.title: Vertex AI toolcalling cumulative token usage
issues.body: Please refer the main epic: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/1800. This issue tracks the fix for calculating the cumulative token usage for Google Vertex AI.

issues.title: RedisVectorStore is broken?

comments.body:
Recently, a new Builder API has been implemented for `RedisVectorStore`. You can instantiate a new instance and pass an `EmbeddingModel` as follows:

`RedisVectorStore vectorStore = RedisVectorStore.builder(jedis, embeddingModel).build();`

Can you help me which new Builder API you're referring to . I can't find a reference to implement

RedisVectorStore vectorStore = RedisVectorStore.builder(jedis, embeddingModel).build();

Aappreciate if you could provide a sample code snippet

thanks
Jay

Hi.  The previous constructors have been deprecated, so existing code will work, if that isn't the case please post what isn't working.

The ref docs are in the process of being updated, should be done for the release today.

In the meantime, you can look at [this configuration](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/6477c0ccfc028c0bf62858ed9b53dd0196bc8241/vector-stores/spring-ai-redis-store/src/test/java/org/springframework/ai/vectorstore/redis/RedisVectorStoreIT.java#L265) used in the integration tests.

issues.title: com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.MismatchedInputException: Cannot deserialize value of type 'org.springframework.ai.model.Media' from Array value (token 'JsonToken.START_ARRAY')
issues.body:
When I use the similaritySearch query of ElasticsearchVectorStore, I encounter the following error:
com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.MismatchedInputException: Cannot deserialize value of type 'org.springframework.ai.model.Media' from Array value (token 'JsonToken.START_ARRAY')
at [Source: REDACTED ('StreamReadFeature.INCLUDE_SOURCE_IN_LOCATION' disabled); line: 1, column: 23047] (through reference chain: org.springframework.ai.document.Document["media"])

main code:

```
@Bean
public ElasticsearchVectorStore vectorStore(RestClient restClient, OllamaEmbeddingModel embeddingModel) {
    ElasticsearchVectorStoreOptions options = new ElasticsearchVectorStoreOptions();
    options.setIndexName("ai-knowledge");    // Optional: defaults to "spring-ai-document-index"
    options.setDimensions(768);             // Optional: defaults to model dimensions or 1536

    return ElasticsearchVectorStore.builder()
            .restClient(restClient)
            .embeddingModel(embeddingModel)
            .options(options)
            .initializeSchema(true)
            .build();
}
```

Code Triggering the Error:
```
List<Document> documents = vectorStore.similaritySearch(searchRequest);
```
What is causing this issue, and how can it be resolved?

This issue did not occur in previous versions. It only appeared when I started using the version spring-ai-elasticsearch-store-1.0.0-20241218.231705-882.jar.

comments.body: I created a new index, and the issue disappeared.
